languages.text: "Станция по добыче {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}прометия{/g} "Тиркуаз-4" несколько циклов задерживает поставки для священных ритуалов Алтаря-Темплума. Действие, что требуется в обмен на наши услуги, таково: вы обязуетесь обратить взор в направлении сей станции и заставить ее отверзнуть вокс-каналы".

traits.locale_text: "Станция по добыче {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}прометия{/g} "Тиркуаз-4" несколько циклов задерживает поставки для священных ритуалов Алтаря-Темплума. Действие, что требуется в обмен на наши услуги, таково: вы обязуетесь обратить взор в направлении сей станции и заставить ее отверзнуть звуковые модули".

languages.text: "For several cycles, {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}promethium{/g} extraction station Tirkuaz-4 has been late in its shipments for Altar-Templum's sacred rites. The action required in exchange for our services is this: you will undertake to cast your gaze toward this station and compel it to open its vox-channels."
languages.original_text: "Станция по добыче {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}прометия{/g} "Тиркуаз-4" несколько циклов задерживает поставки для священных ритуалов Алтаря-Темплума. Действие, что требуется в обмен на наши услуги, таково: вы обязуетесь обратить взор в направлении сей станции и заставить ее отверзнуть вокс-каналы".

traits.locale_text: "For several cycles, promethium extraction station Tirkuaz-4 has been late in its shipments for Altar-Templum's sacred rites. The action required in exchange for our services is this: you will undertake to cast your gaze toward this station and compel it to open its sonic modules."

"For several cycles, promethium extraction station Tirkuaz-4 has been late in its shipments for Altar-Templum's sacred rites. The action required in exchange for our services is this: you will undertake to cast your gaze toward this station and compel it to open its sonic modules."

"For several cycles, promethium extraction station Tirkuaz-4 has been late in its shipments for Altar-Templum's sacred rites. The action required in exchange for our services is this: you will undertake to cast your gaze toward this station and compel it to open its sonic modules."

languages.text: 「プロメシウム抽出ステーション「ティルクアズ・4」は、アルタール・テンプラムの聖典儀式に用いるプロメシウムの輸送が遅れており、その代償として、貴方はこのステーションを視認し、その音響モジュールを開くよう強制する義務を負います」
languages.original_text: "For several cycles, promethium extraction station Tirkuaz-4 has been late in its shipments for Altar-Templum's sacred rites. The action required in exchange for our services is this: you will undertake to cast your gaze toward this station and compel it to open its sonic modules."

traits.locale_text: 「プロメシウム抽出ステーション「ティルクアズ・4」は、アルタール・テンプラムの聖典儀式に用いるプロメシウムの輸送が遅れており、その代償として、貴方はこのステーションを視認し、その音響モジュールを開くよう強制する義務を負います。」

languages.text: «Durante varios ciclos, la estación de extracción de {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}prometio{/g} Tirkuaz 4 se ha retrasado en sus envíos para los ritos sagrados de Altar-Templum. La acción que requerimos a cambio de nuestros servicios es la siguiente: dirija su mirada hacia la estación y exija que abran sus canales de voco».
languages.original_text: "For several cycles, {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}promethium{/g} extraction station Tirkuaz-4 has been late in its shipments for Altar-Templum's sacred rites. The action required in exchange for our services is this: you will undertake to cast your gaze toward this station and compel it to open its vox-channels."

traits.locale_text: «Durante varios ciclos, la estación de extracción de {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}prometio{/g} Tirkuaz 4 se ha retrasado en sus envíos para los ritos sagrados de Altar-Templum. La acción que requerimos a cambio de nuestros servicios es la siguiente: dirija su mirada hacia la estación y exija que abran sus canales de voco».

languages.text: "Die {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}Promethium{/g}-Förderstation Tirkuaz-4 schickt die für die heiligen Riten von Altar-Templum erforderlichen Lieferungen seit einigen Zyklen verspätet. Im Austausch für unsere Hilfe bitten wir Euch um folgendes: Richtet Euren Blick auf diese Station und zwingt sie, ihre Voxkanäle zu öffnen."
languages.original_text: "For several cycles, {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}promethium{/g} extraction station Tirkuaz-4 has been late in its shipments for Altar-Templum's sacred rites. The action required in exchange for our services is this: you will undertake to cast your gaze toward this station and compel it to open its vox-channels."

traits.locale_text: "Die {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}Promethium{/g}-Förderstation Tirkuaz-4 schickt die für die heiligen Riten von Altar-Templum erforderlichen Lieferungen seit einigen Zyklen verspätet. Im Austausch für unsere Hilfe bitten wir Euch um folgendes: Richtet Euren Blick auf diese Station und zwingt sie, ihre Voxkanäle zu öffnen."

languages.text: « Cela fait plusieurs cycles que la station d'extraction de {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}prométhium{/g} de Tirkuaz-4 livre avec du retard les cargaisons nécessaires pour accomplir les rites sacrés d'Altar-Templum. Nous accepterons de vous offrir nos services si vous vous engagez à convaincre les dirigeants de la station d'ouvrir ses canaux-vox. »
languages.original_text: "For several cycles, {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}promethium{/g} extraction station Tirkuaz-4 has been late in its shipments for Altar-Templum's sacred rites. The action required in exchange for our services is this: you will undertake to cast your gaze toward this station and compel it to open its vox-channels."

traits.locale_text: « Cela fait plusieurs cycles que la station d'extraction de {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}prométhium{/g} de Tirkuaz-4 livre avec du retard les cargaisons nécessaires pour accomplir les rites sacrés d'Altar-Templum. Nous accepterons de vous offrir nos services si vous vous engagez à convaincre les dirigeants de la station d'ouvrir ses canaux-vox. »

languages.text: “数个周期以来，提库阿兹4号{g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}钷素{/g}开采站始终未能按时为祭坛输送神圣仪式所需的供给。作为我方服务的交换，所需行动如下：您需着手调查该星站，并强制其启动音阵频道。”
languages.original_text: "For several cycles, {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}promethium{/g} extraction station Tirkuaz-4 has been late in its shipments for Altar-Templum's sacred rites. The action required in exchange for our services is this: you will undertake to cast your gaze toward this station and compel it to open its vox-channels."

traits.locale_text: “数个周期以来，提库阿兹4号{g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}钷素{/g}开采站始终未能按时为祭坛输送神圣仪式所需的供给。作为我方服务的交换，所需行动如下：您需着手调查该星站，并强制其启动音阵频道。”

languages.text: "{g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}Prometyum{/g} çıkarma istasyonu Tirkuaz-4, birkaç döngüdür Altar-Templum'un kutsal ayinleri için gereken sevkiyatları geciktiriyor. Hizmetlerimiz karşılığında talep edilen eylem şudur: Bakışlarınızı bu istasyona çevirecek ve istasyonu, voks kanallarını açmaya zorlayacaksınız."
languages.original_text: "For several cycles, {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}promethium{/g} extraction station Tirkuaz-4 has been late in its shipments for Altar-Templum's sacred rites. The action required in exchange for our services is this: you will undertake to cast your gaze toward this station and compel it to open its vox-channels."

traits.locale_text: "{g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}Prometyum{/g} çıkarma istasyonu Tirkuaz-4, birkaç döngüdür Altar-Templum'un kutsal ayinleri için gereken sevkiyatları geciktiriyor. Hizmetlerimiz karşılığında talep edilen eylem şudur: Bakışlarınızı bu istasyona çevirecek ve istasyonu, voks kanallarını açmaya zorlayacaksınız."
